overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with purple hair walking through a futuristic downtown district. The character traverses sunlit sidewalks, crosses multi-lane streets with futuristic traffic, and passes beneath massive elevated highway structures with neon-lit commercial areas underneath.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown sidewalk approaching elevated highway intersection

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk then stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the street, heading toward the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street
pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the same direction

entered.detail: massive red digital billboard displaying '54' with Japanese characters mounted on a building facade
futuristic glass and steel tower with reflective windows rising in the background
brutalist concrete building with horizontal lines and yellow signage
curved elevated highway structure with distinctive yellow trim

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit downtown sidewalk in a futuristic city, approaching a large intersection dominated by a massive red digital billboard displaying '54'. The area features modern glass skyscrapers and brutalist concrete buildings. The character crosses the multi-lane street as sparse traffic passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway underpass with active traffic

events.description: character enters the shadow of the elevated highway structure, lighting shifts from bright sun to mixed shade
futuristic sedan drives past underneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the massive elevated highway structure alongside other pedestrians, navigating the shaded underpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with yellow trim spanning across the entire street
thick cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the elevated roadway

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the shadow of a massive elevated highway structure, transitioning from bright sunlight to a mixed-light underpass environment. The concrete overpass dominates the sky view while vehicles drive underneath. The character walks alongside thick support pillars as the brutalist architecture looms closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street under highway with neon signage

events.description: neon signs and digital billboards become more prominent in the darker underpass area

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered commercial area under the highway, passing palm trees and neon storefronts

entered.detail: vertical neon sign with red Japanese characters illuminated against the shadowed building
building facade with illuminated windows and digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds deeper into the commercial zone beneath the elevated highway, where neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the shadowed street. The massive highway structure recedes into the background while palm trees and storefronts line the path. The environment maintains a cyberpunk atmosphere with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic downtown district that transitions from a bright, sunlit street into the shadowed, neon-lit depths of an urban underpass. It begins with the character walking along a sunlit sidewalk past glass skyscrapers and brutalist buildings, moving toward a large intersection dominated by a massive red digital billboard. As the character crosses the multi-lane street, the scene shifts from open sunlight into the heavy shadow of a massive elevated highway structure. The camera then follows the character deeper into this underpass, passing thick concrete support pillars as the bright daylight is replaced by the glow of neon signs and digital billboards. Finally, the environment opens into a commercial zone where artificial lights mingle with palm trees and storefronts beneath the receding highway architecture.
